nodes.label: S4 Quick Order List — hero screen (notebook killer)

properties.screen_title: Quick Order List — the hero. The notebook killer.
properties.purpose: Full-catalog quick order entry for distributor sales; all 34 products in one grouped scroll, no pagination, no product pages, no images
variants: S4-LIVE: working demo with template variables, search, qty steppers, empty-search state
S4-b: in-cart rows with longest-name clamp (scrolled to Speakers section)
S4-c: searching 'astra' — filtered results showing 1 of 34 products, cart bar persists
S4-d: empty search state — 'No products match xyz', Clear search CTA, cart bar persists
S4-e: keypad overlay — direct quantity entry via custom 54px numeric keypad
ui_components: sticky search bar (client-side, space-insensitive, name or SKU)
category group headers (sticky while scrolling, e.g. POWER BANKS · 3, SPEAKERS · 10, CHARGING CABLES · 6)
product rows (2-line name clamp + GST-inclusive price + quantity stepper)
quantity stepper (minus / value / plus; 46×52px high-affordance blue + button)
sticky cart bar (item count + running ₹ total + Review chevron button)
keypad overlay (54px keys, 3-digit max, product name label, Cancel / Set quantity actions)
empty-search state (no dead-end: Clear search button)
design_decisions: single grouped scroll — beats 24 taps of notebook ordering
high-affordance blue + stepper filled when in-cart
sticky cart bar survives filtering — total never disappears mid-dictation
custom keypad (no OS keyboard, no focus dance)
longest product name clamps at 2 lines; price row always visible
3 items = distinct lines, so cart count reflects unique SKUs
target: 6-line dictated order in under 90 seconds, one-handed
data_shown: GST-inclusive price in ₹ (paise converted to rupees for display)

nodes.label: Quick Order List — sticky search bar

properties.behavior: client-side, space-insensitive, searches by product name or SKU
states: no-results ('No products match xyz' + Clear search CTA)

nodes.label: Quick Order List — direct-entry keypad overlay

properties.trigger: tap quantity value on any product row
properties.label: product full name shown above keypad
properties.note: no OS keyboard, no focus dance; Scrim-tap or Cancel discards

nodes.label: Quick Order List — sticky cart bar

properties.behavior: persists during search filtering and empty-search states; appears at first quantity added
